subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-05 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: This is the most important of the acquired perfections, inasmuch as acquired knowledge and material education aid one's inborn disposition
subcodes.first_line_orig: این اهم و اقدم از کمالات اکتسابی است زیرا علم اکتسابی و تربیت ظاهری استعداد فطری
subcodes.subjects: @priestcraft, @empty learning; false spirituality, @blind imitation [taqlid], @high station of learning, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
